title: OrganicFarming
description: This plugin serves no function other than distinguishing between crops broken by hand and crops broken automatically.
body:
This plugin allows server owners to distinguish between crops that were farmed (broken) manually by hand and those broken automatically (not by a player).
This doesn't serve much purpose as a standalone plugin, but it may be used in combination with other plugins for example, to make organic crops more expensive than ones that were farmed automatically.
